issues.claim: his body robed at the waist
issues.actual: Christ is rendered in a FULL belted robe covering the whole body rather than just a waist robe/loincloth — more modest than specified but still 'robed at the waist'; reverent and acceptable for the hero stillness shot

issues.claim: a faint sorrowful light on his face
issues.actual: a soft faint luminance sits behind the bowed head — consistent with the specified faint light, not a hard neon halo
